policy.system_prompt_role: Keep only short non-overridable behavior rules in the system prompt.
policy.knowledge_base_role: Use source_docs/Flyback_AI_Agent_知识库_V2.md as the RAG source for KPI, theory, PLECS diagnosis, optimization, and redline checks.
policy.ui_role: Render only structured MAS conclusions and evidence references in normal UI; raw source text belongs in trace/evidence views.
policy.release_rule: Never mark schematic, BOM, PCB, transformer, EMI, safety, thermal, or release artifacts final without calculation, simulation, datasheet/source, EDA, or bench evidence.
